create_time.description: Timestamp for the creation of the secret version, useful for auditing changes

destroy_time.description: Timestamp for the deletion of the secret version, useful for tracking lifecycle events

id.description: Unique identifier for referencing the secret version in configurations

name.description: Resource name used to identify the secret version for API operations

secret_data.description: Encrypted payload of the secret, useful for retrieving sensitive data securely

version.description: Version number indicating the specific iteration of the secret
